ShortDescription.Value: Adjust ALL Speed Limits: Road-Rail-Water (cars, trains, trams, subways, ships).

Publish.LongDescription:
# Adjust All Speed Limits
Is a powerful, easy toolkit to fine-tune how fast vehicles travel on any network type.
## 🎛️ Key Features
- **Adjust speeds on individual segments** with a simple click. - **Click-and-drag selection** to modify multiple segments at once. - Works on: - 🚗 **Roads** 🚊 **Tram tracks** 🚆 **Train tracks** 🚇 **Subway rails** ⛵ **Waterways** - Stats are light: only runs when the panel is open, better data than Info view. - don't forget Like button, top right, so more people know about the mod :)
## Important
- Remove old "Road Speed Adjuster" (RSA) mod before installing this mod. Old one is no longer maintained (retired). - Existing custom speeds should remain and can be edited/reset per segment in new mod. - Vehicles are still limited by their max speeds (different for each type). - Removing this mod does not reset your customized speed limits. Any speeds you set will remain on the section until you delete/change the road. - **Use Reset buttons** and then Save City to restore the roads/segments to default speeds. - Performance: stats update only while the speed tool panel is open. Mod runs only when you have it open, make a change, then it goes back to sleep - easy, done. - ICE-3 trains have a real top speed of 320km/h, so the rail slider allows up to 400km/h (800km/h with doubled display). - The game's Unlimited highway policy is 200km/h normally, or 400km/h with "Show Game Doubled Speeds".
## Support and Feedback - If you download the mod, consider giving a like :) It takes weeks and months to make these level of mods and many hours with testers. - Feedback welcome see Github or Discord links to the right of this page.
## ❤️ Special Thanks Huge appreciation hugs and waves to everyone
- chaosfun: testing and video: https://youtu.be/qADctjYS5-w - Maestro, gagaxm, Obelix: testing and feedback. - Thanks to everyone who tested, supported, or guided development along the way! - Thumbnail photo taken in Toronto, Canada by [Alex Smith] https://unsplash.com/photos/time-lapse-photography-of-vehicles-in-busy-road-sRTLpqB5haw - History and thanks to all past modders: SwiftCobra creator of the first speed mod (MIT license). It passed to Aberro's mod (MIT) and then to DanielVNZ's version (retired).
tags: water speed, seaway, track speed, tracks, ship, boat, ferry.
Publish.ChangeLog: - Made long stretches of connected roads much easier to select. - Added distinct floating-number colors: green for trains, pink for subways, and blue-green for roads and waterways. - Added separate bus and taxi rows to Stats on mod's in-city panel. - Prevented custom road and rail speeds from reverting when CS2 refreshes or rebuilds lane data. - Improved floating-number sizing and placement across zoom levels, including underground subway markers. - Reduced map clutter by grouping distant numbers and showing nearby numbers by proximity. - Fixed slider increments so they continue from the current speed (for example, 45 → 55 with increment 10). - Changed MPH presets to 10–90 and kept lower 5mph available through the slider and −/+ controls. - Corrected road unlimited to 200km/h normally or 400km/h with doubled Options settings enabled. - Options settings save immediately.
